title: Authors and Citation
text: Kelsey Shaw. Author, maintainer. Caetano Dorea. Author. Linda Strande. Author. Charles Niwagaba. Author. Mian Zhong. Author.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Shaw K, Dorea C, Strande L, Niwagaba C, Zhong M (2026). “fecalcanuga: Demographic, Environmental, Technical Physio-chemical Data Non Sewered Sanitation Containments Rural Canada Urban Uganda.” doi:10.5281/zenodo.20795917. https://github.com/openwashdata/fecalcanuga.
code: @Misc{shaw_etall:2026,   title = {fecalcanuga: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda},   author = {Kelsey Shaw and Caetano Dorea and Linda Strande and Charles Niwagaba and Mian Zhong},   year = {2026},   doi = {10.5281/zenodo.20795917},   url = {https://github.com/openwashdata/fecalcanuga},   abstract = {This data package contains data representing 5 months of field work from April - June 2023 (Canada) and January - February 2024 (Uganda) collecting household and commercial wastewater containment data and characterizing physical, chemical and greenhouse gas data for 22 non-sewered sanitation sites on southern Vancouver island and the southern gulf islands in British Columbia, Canada and 19 sites in Kampala, Uganda.},   version = {0.1.0}, }

what: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda
title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda
text: goal fecalcanuga provide data representing 5 months field work April - June 2023 Southern Coastal BC (Canada) Kampala (Uganda) January - February 2024 household commercial non-sewered containment data collected, characterizing demographic, technical, environmental, physical, chemical biological data 22 non-sewered sanitation sites Southern Coastal British Columbia, Canada 19 sites Kampala, Uganda.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda
text: can install development version fecalcanuga GitHub : Alternatively, can download individual datasets CSV file table .
code: # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("openwashdata/fecalcanuga") ## Run the following code in console if you don't have the packages ## install.packages(c("dplyr", "knitr", "readr", "stringr", "gt", "kableExtra")) library(dplyr) library(knitr) library(readr) library(stringr) library(gt) library(kableExtra)

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda
text: package provides access 3 datasets: containment, household_survey, phys_chem_parameter.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda
text: dataset containment contains data technical data (containment size, volume, fecal sludge depth, etc.) non-sewered sanitation system containment sampled part field work. 41 observations 10 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda
text: dataset household_survey contains data collected household / institutional survey data location non-sewered sanitation containment sampled. includes demographic infromation, operational maintenance information technical environmental parameters. 41 observations 39 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda
text: dataset phys_chem_parameter contains data measured situ analyzed laboratory physical, chemical biological parameters pertaining containment sampled well different veritcal locations containment (.e., Top containment, middle bottom). 119 observations 29 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda
code: # Plot of Volatile Suspended Solids (VSS) versus Chemical Oxygen Demand (COD) for all samples. This plot demonstrates how changes in organic loads (COD) can influence biomass (VSS) library(fecalcanuga) library(ggplot2) # Filter out rows with NA values in COD or vss filtered_data <- phys_chem_parameter %>%   filter(!is.na(COD) & !is.na(vss))  # Plot VSS vs COD ggplot(filtered_data, aes(x = vss, y = COD)) +   geom_point() +   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +   theme_minimal() +   labs(title = "VSS vs COD",        x = "VSS (mg/L)",        y = "COD (mg/L)")

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda

title: containment: Technical Data for each Non-Sewered Sanitation Containment — containment
text: data set contains technical data (containment size, volume, fecal sludge depth, etc.) non-sewered sanitation system containment sampled part field work.

title: containment: Technical Data for each Non-Sewered Sanitation Containment — containment
containment: Technical Data for each Non-Sewered Sanitation Containment — containment
text: tibble 41 rows 10 variables sample_id unique identifier sampling location format ##-Location-ddmmyyyy location_id unique location identifier sampling day format (#)-day sampling () - location day date date sampling area surface area liquid surface containment m^2 sludge_depth depth meters, top sludge sample taken containment_depth depth meters, top containment bottom containment containment_volume total volume containment m^3 fs_volume total volume sludge containment m^3 accumulation_rate accumulation rate litres/capita -year (based total volume number users) scum_depth depth top scum layer centimeters

what: ghg: Greenhouse Gas Mass Flux Rates for each Non-Sewered Sanitation Containment — ghg
title: ghg: Greenhouse Gas Mass Flux Rates for each Non-Sewered Sanitation Containment — ghg
text: data set contains calculated mass flux rates measured point-source situ GHG measurments observed person equivalents containment three key greenhouse gases (CH4, CO2 N2O).

ghg: Greenhouse Gas Mass Flux Rates for each Non-Sewered Sanitation Containment — ghg

text: data set contains measured situ analyzed laboratory physical, chemical biological parameters pertaining containment sampled well different vertical locations containment (.e., Top containment, middle bottom).

title: phys_chem_parameter: Physio-Chemical Parameter Data for each Non-sewered Sanitation Containment — phys_chem_parameter
phys_chem_parameter: Physio-Chemical Parameter Data for each Non-sewered Sanitation Containment — phys_chem_parameter
text: tibble 119 rows 29 variables sample_id unique identifier sampling location format ##-Location-ddmmyyyy location_id unique location identifier sampling day format (#)-day sampling () - location day date date sampling depth_id unique identifier sample indicating location containment (T = top, M = middle, B = bottom) sludge_depth depth meters, top sludge sample taken temperature Temperature sludge insitu sampling location (degrees Celsius) dissolved oxygen concentration mg/L insitu sampling location pH pH value insitu sampling location ORP oxidation reduction potential, measured millivolts, insitu sampling locations EC electrical conductivity, measured microSiemens, insitu sampling locations COD Chemical oxygen demand, mg/L soluble_COD Soluble chemical oxygen demand, mg/L sulphide Sulphide, mg/L total_nitrogen Total Nitrogen, mg/L nitrite Nitrite, mg/L nitrate Nitrate, mg/L ammonia Ammonia, mg/L TKN Total Kjeldahl Nitrogen, mg/L ortho_phosphorous Ortho Phosphorous, mg/L total_phosphorous Total Phosphorous, mg/L BOD Biochemical oxygen demand, mg/L TOC Total organic carbon, mg/L ts Total solids, g/L vs Volatile Solids, g/L vs_percent Volatile Solids, % total solids sand_content Sand content, g/L tss Total suspended solids, g/L vss Volatile suspended solids, g/L vss_tss VSS/TSS (ratio)

title: fecalcanuga 0.1.0
text: First release fecalcanuga data package, providing data 5 months field work characterizing non-sewered sanitation containments Southern Coastal British Columbia, Canada (April - June 2023) Kampala, Uganda (January - February 2024).

title: fecalcanuga 0.1.0
text: Added containment dataset: technical data (size, volume, fecal sludge depth) sampled containment (41 observations, 10 variables). Added household_survey dataset: demographic, operational, technical, environmental survey data sampled location (41 observations, 39 variables). Added phys_chem_parameter dataset: -situ laboratory physical, chemical, biological parameters measured top, middle, bottom containment (119 observations, 29 variables). dataset also available CSV file inst/extdata/ bundled inst/extdata/fecalcanuga.xlsx.

title: fecalcanuga 0.1.0
text: Renamed greenhouse gas flux variable flux_n20 flux_n2o correctly denote nitrous oxide (N2O). Synced data-raw/dictionary.csv data removing two variables (, notes) present household_survey. Pointed package URLs (install instructions, CSV download links, pkgdown site) canonical openwashdata/fecalcanuga repository. Corrected typos package description, citation, dataset documentation, data dictionary, added missing 2024 year Uganda fieldwork dates.
